feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP CDS Enum declaration and accessing values
entry.content:
I am trying to find how to access the Values from Enum in ABAP using the following example.

I have declared the following Enum

@EndUserText.label: 'Enum Value'
define type ze_testenum : abap.char(8) enum
{
  UNKNOWN = initial;
  Sun     = '7';
  Mon     = '1';
  Tue     = '2';
  Wed     = '3';
  Thu     = '4';
  Fri     = '5';
  Sat     = '6';
}

Next, I defined the following View Entity

define view entity ZI_TestEnum
  as select from I_CalendarDate
{
  key CalendarDate,
      ze_testenum.#Sun as Word
}
where
  CalendarDate = $session.system_date

The output of the CDS is

Next, I updated the View definition to:

define view entity ZI_TestEnum
  as select from I_CalendarDate
{
  key CalendarDate,
      ze_testenum.#Sun as Word,
      cast(ze_testenum.#Sun as abap.char(8)) as Word2
}
where
  CalendarDate = $session.system_date

The output of this CDS is:

Next, I tried to use the same method in ABAP using the following class

class zcl_je_test definition
  public
  final
  create public .

  public section.
    interfaces if_oo_adt_classrun.
  protected section.
  private section.
endclass.

class zcl_je_test implementation.
  method if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    out->write( ze_testenum-mon ).
    out->write( conv string( ze_testenum-mon ) ).
  endmethod.
endclass.

Output of this class is:

Here in ABAP, casting doesn't convert the value of Mon to 1 unlike in CDS View definition. Why this difference in behavior?

I added the following statement in the Class

out->write( conv ze_testenum( '1' ) ).

Now the output of the class is

I tried the same in CDS view definition by adding the following statement

cast('2' as ze_testenum) as Word3

The output of CDS now is 

In summary, I am able to:

  1. Print/Output Enumerated Constant Name in both ABAP & CDS
  2. Convert Value to Constant Name in both ABAP & CDS
  3. Convert Constant Name to Value in CDS by Casting, whereas Casting in ABAP code doesn't convert the value

Question(1) : Is casting the correct method to access the defined fixed values (Enumerated Values) from the CDS?

Question (2): How do I convert Constant Name to Value in ABAP code?

Tagging blog owner here for better reach @AndreaUS

entry.title: what documents, data or attachments are stored on DMS_CONT1_CD1
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Want to know that what documents or attachments are stored on DMS_CONT1_CD1 

We have performed steps which mentioned in SAP note 3499623 - DMS_CONT1_CD1 has grown very large in your SAP system - SAP for Me

entry.title: Can I write the one or Standard Unit Test for my all ABAP Code ?
entry.content: Unit Test topic is new for me. Therefore, I do not have much knowledge about it. So I want to ask if I can create the Standardized Unit Test for my all codes such as I can test the main code using the already developed Unit Test code / class or methods?

entry.title: Error during import of clipboard contents
entry.content:
Using FM: ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE, we tried to execute the program in background, but we encountered this error "Error during import of clipboard contents".


When we run it in foreground, it is working normally. may we know what would be the resolution for this?

entry.title: Email de notificação de entrega
entry.content:
Boa tarde!

Existe alguma maneira de, quando enviamos um pedido de compra por email, o comprador ser notificado de que o email foi entregue, recebendo um email com o OK? Quando tínhamos o sap ECC isso funcionava, porém agora no S/4 não funciona de maneira nenhuma. Estamos utilizando a classe CL_BCS para envio dos emails. 

A solicitação de leitura está funcionando, mas a de notificação de entrega do e-mail não chega de maneira alguma. Alguém tem uma luz pra me ajudar com isso? Obrigado

entry.title: The user wants a warning popup message to appear after inputting a custom field at the header level
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Some custom fields have been created at the header level of the Sales Billing screen (VF01), including a field for the Bill of Lading Date. The user wants a warning popup message to appear after inputting this field, saying: "Please reverify the Date." I have tried multiple BADIs, but it does not seem to be possible. Could you please confirm if this is achievable or suggest any possible solutions?

entry.title: Issue in ABAP CDS Views - SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

I have created a Data definition with Sales Order and Sales Order Item fields and when I see the output I am getting as below.

But My requirement is to get data as below. 

I require order items grouped with order no. 

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to change the year in number ranges with nr status
entry.content: I am trying to change the year using Tcode: fbn1 but the system does not recognize it. How to overcome this problem.

entry.title: but why its not updating in standard table by staging table?
How to enable smart link with Action CDS view tile
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to display "Manage GL Account" App from my custom CDS based Fiori app.

as added semantic object @consumption.sematicobject: 'GLAccount' and UI.Lineitem.semanticObjectAction: "manage" but when i click on GL account but still i can see all actions when i click on GL account in App output.

Please guide me how to directly navigate to Manage GLAccount app.

entry.title: Mass SPRO Special Procurement Key config options
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a business requirement to change the Long text for all languages (Goto -> Translation) for Special Procurement Key (Plant & SPK combination).

However the combination records are 6800. Hence manual maintenance is more time consuming. I tried LSMW but it didn't work due to SPRO navigation and scroll.

Tried to debug T460T table and maintain, but the problem is when copied 6800 from excel and pass in table, it shows 13000 records. Means, if an SPK is used by another plant, it will obviously pull that as well. Which we don't want to change.

Hence is there any other option in STD or way to do this change in Mass.

Kindly let me know.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: SAP Logon 750 crashes to desktop without errors after installing AMD drivers
entry.content:
I recently upgraded to an RX 7700 XT and decided it was a good time for a fresh Windows install. After setting up all my drivers and applications, I installed SAP Logon 750. However, when I tried to connect, the application immediately disappeared without any error messages.

I tried various troubleshooting steps from online sources, but nothing worked. Eventually, Perplexity suggested checking the GPU drivers, as similar issues had been reported with Nvidia cards. I uninstalled all AMD drivers and software using Revo Uninstaller, rebooted, and to my surprise, SAP Logon remained open, and I could successfully connect to my server.

Unfortunately, as soon as I reinstalled the AMD drivers and Adrenaline software, the problem returned. Do you have any advice on resolving this? My CPU does have integrated graphics, but it's over 12 years old, and I'd really like to use my new GPU.

I hope this is the correct place to post this...

entry.title: Conditionally Disable a field in 2-step maintenance type table using TMG events
entry.content: I have a requirement to disable a field based on other field's input in 2-step maintenance type while creating a new entry and changing the existing entry in a maintenance view

entry.title: Party entitled to dispose 30000142 not assigned to warehouse number RM01
Please let me know CDS views for extractor 0CO_OM_NWA_2 and 0CO_OM_WBS_6
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please let me know CDS views which has same result as Datasources 0CO_OM_NWA_2 and 0CO_OM_WBS_6

Thanks

Vijay

entry.title: standard editor
entry.content:
hello i need to change the logic in an implementation class of a body but i got this error

You cannot edit object R3TR CLAS ZZ1_VKBUR_ENTETE with
the standard editor

Can anyone help me

entry.title: update field of interna table from another internal table
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am working on report program where I am interested in using the advanced syntax rather than loop endloop.

I have avoided at many places by using for loop which I was successful in achieving it. But I am facing issue at one instance where I have to avoid loop endloop.

  
 DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final.  
DATA : lt_final    TYPE TABLE OF ty_final,   

 LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).
      READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = <fs>-bukrs
                                                    belnr = <fs>-belnr
                                                    gjahr = <fs>-gjahr
                                                    buzei = <fs>-buzei
                                                    lifnr = <fs>-lifnr  .
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_final-remarks = <fs>-remarks.
        MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. DATA : lt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(). READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = -bukrs belnr = -belnr gjahr = -gjahr buzei = -buzei lifnr = -lifnr . IF sy-subrc = 0. ls_final-remarks = -remarks. MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final. ENDIF. ENDLOOP.

I do not want not to use this code as loop endloop is causing performance issue.    Please help me with new syntax of 7. 4 and 7.5 to achive the above  result.

entry.title: Extract the Report from SAP into Excel file
entry.content:
Hello All,

I require to interact with SAP and download the report from SAP. I am currently automating the SAP GUI to generate report from SAP by using Excel VBA Script. But, It took lot of time to complete the report extraction. 

Is there any way to get the reports from SAP without disturbing the foreground on the system ?

entry.title: 請問有API可以讓外部系統查詢[自動科目決定]嗎?
entry.content:
有提供標準API可以讓外部系統查詢[自動科目決定]的資料嗎?

或是，自動科目決定有CDS View可以運用嗎?

entry.title: Would i able to do stay certified assessment by purchasing cert attempt (CER001) or CER006
entry.content:
My certification is expiring by 31st march 2025 . I dont have SAP learning HUB subscription . 

Could i be able to do stay certified assessment by purchasing certification attempt (CER001) or CER006..

i am bit confused whether this certification attempt is kind of full fledge exam like before or its on delta ..
